opening_line: Good morning! Please have a seat.
script: Good morning! Please have a seat. | Thank you very much. | What is your name? | My name is Linda Green. | Do you have any work experience? | Yes, I worked in a shop for two years. | What are your strong points? | I am friendly and I work hard. | Why do you want this job? | I love helping people. Thank you for your time.
